candidate_discovery.project_name_group_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select lower(trim(coalesce(p.project_name,''))) as project_key, count(*) as n, group_concat(r.record_id, ' | ') as ids from records r join projects p on r.record_id=p.record_id where r.record_kind='project' and coalesce(p.project_name,'') != '' group by lower(trim(p.project_name)) having n > 1 order by n desc, project_key limit 120;"
candidate_discovery.display_name_group_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select lower(trim(r.display_name)) as display_key, count(*) as n, group_concat(r.record_id, ' | ') as ids from records r where r.record_kind='project' and coalesce(r.display_name,'') != '' group by lower(trim(r.display_name)) having n > 1 order by n desc, display_key limit 120;"
candidate_discovery.result_summary: Selected only exact-title project groups with compatible project_type/project_family/status snapshots. Skipped ambiguous bus-priority rows where phase, route variant, document audience, or corridor scope could make same-name records distinct.

record_existence_and_kind.command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select r.record_id, r.record_kind, r.display_name, p.project_name, p.project_type, p.project_family, p.document_time_status, p.status, r.primary_source_id, (select count(*) from record_sources rs where rs.record_id=r.record_id) as source_count from records r join projects p on r.record_id=p.record_id where r.record_id in ('project_meeting-doc-111896-mnr-auto-fuel-system','project_mnr-automotive-fuel-system-may2023','project_mnrr-fuel-system-upgrade','project_r211-subway-car-program','project_r211-subway-cars-dec2024','project_r211-subway-car-meeting-doc-113971','project_98266-overhead-bridge-program','project_meeting-doc-111786-overhead-bridge-program-ny','project_meeting-doc-104771-overhead-bridge-program-ny','project_98266-right-of-way-fence','project_mnr-right-of-way-fence-q3-2023','project_meeting-doc-104771-right-of-way-fence') order by r.record_id;"
record_existence_and_kind.count_command: sqlite3 data/canonical.db "select count(*) from records where record_kind='project' and record_id in ('project_meeting-doc-111896-mnr-auto-fuel-system','project_mnr-automotive-fuel-system-may2023','project_mnrr-fuel-system-upgrade','project_r211-subway-car-program','project_r211-subway-cars-dec2024','project_r211-subway-car-meeting-doc-113971','project_98266-overhead-bridge-program','project_meeting-doc-111786-overhead-bridge-program-ny','project_meeting-doc-104771-overhead-bridge-program-ny','project_98266-right-of-way-fence','project_mnr-right-of-way-fence-q3-2023','project_meeting-doc-104771-right-of-way-fence');"
record_existence_and_kind.result_summary: 12/12 selected alias and target records exist as record_kind=project. Field checks show exact project_name/display-name matches within each selected project family: Metro-North Upgrade Automotive Fuel System Project, R211 Subway Car Program, Overhead Bridge Program (NY), and Right of Way Fence.

source_evidence_spot_check.db_evidence_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select record_id, json_extract(ref_json,'$.evidence_id') as evidence_id, source_id, page_number, block_id from evidence_refs where record_id in ('project_meeting-doc-111896-mnr-auto-fuel-system','project_mnr-automotive-fuel-system-may2023','project_mnrr-fuel-system-upgrade','project_r211-subway-car-program','project_r211-subway-cars-dec2024','project_r211-subway-car-meeting-doc-113971','project_98266-overhead-bridge-program','project_meeting-doc-111786-overhead-bridge-program-ny','project_meeting-doc-104771-overhead-bridge-program-ny','project_98266-right-of-way-fence','project_mnr-right-of-way-fence-q3-2023','project_meeting-doc-104771-right-of-way-fence') and ordinal < 3 order by record_id, ordinal;"
source_evidence_spot_check.result_summary: All selected records have source-backed evidence refs. Evidence refs are included per alias above.

existing_alias_conflicts.merges_json_command: for id in project_meeting-doc-111896-mnr-auto-fuel-system project_mnrr-fuel-system-upgrade project_r211-subway-car-meeting-doc-113971 project_r211-subway-cars-dec2024 project_98266-overhead-bridge-program project_meeting-doc-111786-overhead-bridge-program-ny project_98266-right-of-way-fence project_mnr-right-of-way-fence-q3-2023; do jq -r --arg id "$id" '.aliases.project[$id] // empty | select(. != "") | $id + " -> " + .' data/identity-overrides/merges.json; done
existing_alias_conflicts.merges_json_result: no output; none of the proposed aliases are already present in data/identity-overrides/merges.json
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select kind, alias, target from identity_aliases where kind='project' and alias in ('project_meeting-doc-111896-mnr-auto-fuel-system','project_mnrr-fuel-system-upgrade','project_r211-subway-car-meeting-doc-113971','project_r211-subway-cars-dec2024','project_98266-overhead-bridge-program','project_meeting-doc-111786-overhead-bridge-program-ny','project_98266-right-of-way-fence','project_mnr-right-of-way-fence-q3-2023');"
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_result: no output; none of the proposed aliases are already present in canonical identity_aliases
existing_alias_conflicts.target_alias_guard_command: for id in project_mnr-automotive-fuel-system-may2023 project_r211-subway-car-program project_meeting-doc-104771-overhead-bridge-program-ny project_meeting-doc-104771-right-of-way-fence; do jq -r --arg id "$id" '.aliases.project[$id] // empty | select(. != "") | $id + " -> " + .' data/identity-overrides/merges.json; done; sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select kind, alias, target from identity_aliases where kind='project' and alias in ('project_mnr-automotive-fuel-system-may2023','project_r211-subway-car-program','project_meeting-doc-104771-overhead-bridge-program-ny','project_meeting-doc-104771-right-of-way-fence');"
existing_alias_conflicts.target_alias_guard_result: no output; selected targets are not themselves registered aliases in overrides or canonical identity_aliases

do_not_merge_conflicts.db_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(alias,target) as (values ('project_meeting-doc-111896-mnr-auto-fuel-system','project_mnr-automotive-fuel-system-may2023'),('project_mnrr-fuel-system-upgrade','project_mnr-automotive-fuel-system-may2023'),('project_r211-subway-car-meeting-doc-113971','project_r211-subway-car-program'),('project_r211-subway-cars-dec2024','project_r211-subway-car-program'),('project_98266-overhead-bridge-program','project_meeting-doc-104771-overhead-bridge-program-ny'),('project_meeting-doc-111786-overhead-bridge-program-ny','project_meeting-doc-104771-overhead-bridge-program-ny'),('project_98266-right-of-way-fence','project_meeting-doc-104771-right-of-way-fence'),('project_mnr-right-of-way-fence-q3-2023','project_meeting-doc-104771-right-of-way-fence')) select d.* from do_not_merge d join pairs p on d.kind='project' and ((d.record_id_a=p.alias and d.record_id_b=p.target) or (d.record_id_a=p.target and d.record_id_b=p.alias));"
do_not_merge_conflicts.db_result: no output; no selected pair is present in canonical do_not_merge
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_command: jq -r '.pairs.project[]? | select((.record_ids | index("project_meeting-doc-111896-mnr-auto-fuel-system") and index("project_mnr-automotive-fuel-system-may2023")) or (.record_ids | index("project_mnrr-fuel-system-upgrade") and index("project_mnr-automotive-fuel-system-may2023")) or (.record_ids | index("project_r211-subway-car-meeting-doc-113971") and index("project_r211-subway-car-program")) or (.record_ids | index("project_r211-subway-cars-dec2024") and index("project_r211-subway-car-program")) or (.record_ids | index("project_98266-overhead-bridge-program") and index("project_meeting-doc-104771-overhead-bridge-program-ny")) or (.record_ids | index("project_meeting-doc-111786-overhead-bridge-program-ny") and index("project_meeting-doc-104771-overhead-bridge-program-ny")) or (.record_ids | index("project_98266-right-of-way-fence") and index("project_meeting-doc-104771-right-of-way-fence")) or (.record_ids | index("project_mnr-right-of-way-fence-q3-2023") and index("project_meeting-doc-104771-right-of-way-fence"))) | .record_ids | @tsv' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_result: no output; no selected pair is present in data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json

prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity111.command: for f in data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch0*-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch10[0-9]-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch11[0-1]-prep.json; do jq -r --arg f "$f" '.proposed_aliases[]? | select(.kind=="project") | select(.alias_id as $a | ["project_meeting-doc-111896-mnr-auto-fuel-system","project_mnrr-fuel-system-upgrade","project_r211-subway-car-meeting-doc-113971","project_r211-subway-cars-dec2024","project_98266-overhead-bridge-program","project_meeting-doc-111786-overhead-bridge-program-ny","project_98266-right-of-way-fence","project_mnr-right-of-way-fence-q3-2023"] | index($a)) | [$f,.alias_id,.target_id] | @tsv' "$f" 2>/dev/null; done
prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity111.result: no output; none of the proposed aliases appear in prior codex identity prep artifacts through batch111

forbidden_command_compliance.result: No external/provider-backed commands or profiles/providers were used. No canonicalize, canonicalize-wave, canonicalize-review, campaign dedup, identity-review-run, write, ask, schema-propose, ontology-normalize-run, materialize, export-jsonl, or validate commands were run. Inspection used local deterministic commands only: pwd, git status, ls/sed/head/date, rg, jq, and sqlite3; the only file write was this prep artifact.
